subcodes.first_line: O companion of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy two letters arrived at the most propitious hour, and their perusal brought joy and spiritual delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عبدالبهاء دو طغرا نامه شما در بهترین ساعت وارد و از قرائتش روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @business; financial; property matters, @service to others; to the Cause of God
